title: 菊花賞の後に・白い大輪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After winning the Kikuka Sho, Tamamo Cross is
happy to have become a not-so-secret weapon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The experience she has picked up here will lend
itself well to the spring Tenno Sho, another
long-distance senior G1 race held in Kyoto—and
one that her father holds in high regard.
